ConstValues.value:
"import os
import shutil
import sys

_real_python = os.environ.get("SWIFTPYTHON_PYTHON_EXECUTABLE") or os.environ.get("PYTHONEXECUTABLE")
if not _real_python:
    _real_python = shutil.which("python3") or shutil.which("python")
if _real_python:
    sys.executable = _real_python"
"Failed to set resource limits on worker "
